expected_explanation.en: Manufacturer name and address are present.
expected_explanation.fr: Le nom et l'adresse du fabricant sont presents.
Le nom du produit est present.

expected_explanation.en: The registration number is missing from the label.
expected_explanation.fr: Le numero d'enregistrement est absent de l'etiquette.

expected_explanation.en: The label does not provide registration numbers for exempt mixture components.
expected_explanation.fr: L'etiquette ne fournit pas les numeros d'enregistrement des composantes du melange exempte.

expected_explanation.en: Directions for use are missing from the label.
expected_explanation.fr: Les modes d'emploi sont absents de l'etiquette.

expected_explanation.en: Net weight is missing from the label.
expected_explanation.fr: Le poids net est absent de l'etiquette.

expected_explanation.en: Precaution statements are missing from the label.
expected_explanation.fr: Les enonces de precaution sont absents de l'etiquette.

expected_explanation.en: No prohibited material statement condition is triggered.
expected_explanation.fr: Aucune condition de declaration de matiere interdite n'est declenchee.

expected_explanation.en: Lot number is missing from the label.
expected_explanation.fr: Le numero de lot est absent de l'etiquette.

requirement_ref.title_en: List of Materials Term for Exempt Products

expected_explanation.en: An exempt label context is present but no explicit list-of-materials term is provided.
expected_explanation.fr: Un contexte d'exemption est present mais aucune mention explicite de liste des materiaux n'est fournie.
